summary: Iteration 156 — Pastry Module Stripe Checkout + Photoreal Upgrade testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 Pastry routes verified (/pastry, /pastry/admin, /pastry/success, root /).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/pastry/checkout/session correctly creates Stripe checkout URL and persists pending transaction ✓
GET /api/pastry/checkout/status/{session_id} returns 404 for unknown sessions, handles Stripe test session expiry gracefully ✓
GET /api/pastry/admin/subscribers returns seeded bakeries (Sweet Haven, Rose Patisserie) with MRR=$98 total ✓
GET /api/pastry/packages returns standalone_monthly with $299 amount ($250 setup + $49/mo), 6 features, stripe_enabled=true ✓
POST /api/webhook/stripe correctly rejects bad signature with 400 ✓
POST /api/cake-ai/photoreal/render returns tier-by-tier sensory prompt with flux-pro/v1.1 (buttercream, fondant, piping, flowers, toppers, stand) ✓
POST /api/ai-image/generate with provider=fal_flux generates photoreal image ✓
/pastry landing page renders with all data-testids (pastry-hero-title, pastry-checkout-btn, pastry-bakery-input, pastry-email-input), 6 feature cards, pricing card ✓
/pastry/admin shows 4 KPI tiles (Active subscribers=2, MRR=$98, Lifetime=$647, Total signups=2) and table with seeded rows ✓
/pastry/success?session_id=invalid handles gracefully - shows timeout message after 10 poll attempts, provides 'Back to pricing' button ✓
Root / (main app) loads successfully - no boot freeze at 'importing-entry', full dashboard renders ✓
test_credentials: STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent, FAL_KEY set in backend/.env, test card 4242424242424242
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with TEST_ prefix during photoreal render test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter156 delivered Pastry Module Stripe checkout ($299 combined = $250 setup + $49 first month) and upgraded photoreal endpoint to flux-pro/v1.1 with tier-by-tier sensory prompts. All endpoints tested: (1) POST /api/pastry/checkout/session creates Stripe URL + pending transaction, (2) GET /api/pastry/checkout/status/{session_id} polls Stripe status, (3) GET /api/pastry/admin/subscribers returns MRR dashboard with seeded bakeries, (4) GET /api/pastry/packages returns pricing info, (5) POST /api/webhook/stripe validates signature, (6) POST /api/cake-ai/photoreal/render builds rich tier-by-tier prompt. Frontend routes: /pastry (landing), /pastry/admin (revenue dashboard), /pastry/success (post-checkout poll). Seeded subscribers: Sweet Haven ($49 MRR, $299 lifetime), Rose Patisserie ($49 MRR, $348 lifetime).

backend_new: GET /api/pastry/checkout/status/{session_id} handles Stripe test session expiry ✓
GET /api/pastry/admin/subscribers returns subscribers array with seeded data ✓
POST /api/cake-ai/photoreal/render returns image_url and tier-by-tier prompt ✓
frontend_verified: /pastry landing page has pastry-checkout-btn with '$299 today' text ✓
/pastry landing page has pastry-bakery-input and pastry-email-input ✓
/pastry landing page has pastry-hero-image (photoreal cake render) ✓
/pastry/admin shows 4 KPI tiles (Active subscribers, MRR, Lifetime revenue, Total signups) ✓
/pastry/admin shows pastry-admin-table with Sweet Haven and Rose Patisserie rows ✓
/pastry/success with invalid session_id shows timeout message after 10 attempts ✓
/pastry/success provides 'Back to pricing' button on timeout ✓
Root / loads successfully - no boot freeze ✓
Root / shows full Enterprise Command Center dashboard ✓
